name: Chrome DevTools MCP
description: Local stdio MCP: automate Chrome (tabs, snapshots, screenshots, console, network). Installed on first connect via npx.

setupSteps.title: Prerequisites
setupSteps.instructions: Install Node.js (for npx) and Google Chrome in the default install location for your OS.

setupSteps.title: Add server
setupSteps.instructions: Click Add server below. Vodou runs brain-trust4 connect chrome-devtools … — the first run may download the package (network required).
setupSteps.gotcha: Cold start can take a minute. If tools stay at 0, wait and use Test connection after enabling the server under Capabilities.

setupSteps.title: Enable in Tools
setupSteps.instructions: Open Capabilities → MCP Servers and turn chrome-devtools on so chat can call its tools.
